title: Codebase Map Manifest
description: Tracks extraction state, per-file timestamps, and incremental update metadata. Written by goyoke-codebase-extract, read by /codebase-map skill for incremental diffing.

repo_name.description: Repository name resolved via git remote > directory name > 'unknown-repo'

project_root.description: Absolute path to project root at time of extraction

modules.description: Per-module tracking. Key = module path (slash-separated, e.g., 'cmd/goyoke-validate').

last_full_map.description: Timestamp of last full (non-incremental) map. Null if never run.

last_incremental.description: Timestamp of last incremental update. Null if never run.

extractor_version.description: Version of goyoke-codebase-extract that produced this manifest

git_commit.description: Git commit SHA at time of extraction

files.description: Per-file timestamps. Key = file path relative to project root.

last_extracted.description: Timestamp of last extraction for this module

last_enriched.description: Timestamp of last LLM enrichment. Null if not yet enriched.

status.description: Current state of this module's extraction

extracted_at.description: When this file was last extracted

enriched_at.description: When this file's module was last enriched. Null if not yet.

line_count.description: Total lines in the file at extraction time

symbol_count.description: Number of symbols extracted from this file

total_symbols.description: Total symbols extracted across all modules
